creatives.niche_raw: makers, coders, open-source hobbyists, community game developers
creatives.angle_raw: the open-source game platform you build and program yourself — community is the product

claims: Learn to code and create your own games
mechanism: community guides and tutorials built in

claims: A miniature game system the size of a credit card

notes: Arduboy page prominently features open-source community framing, learn-to-code angle, and game library. 'Transparent' hardware is implied by the open-source/Arduino culture (PCB visible in photos) but NOT explicitly led as the headline. The community and hackability are the primary lead. Note: Arduboy Mini [Kickstarter Funded!] mentioned in community forum — mini variant exists.
